allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "java" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $\($_.Id\)"; $_.Kill\(\) }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-Process -Name "java" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)

PowerShell(taskkill /F /IM java.exe 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $remaining = \(Get-Process -Name "java" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count; Write-Output "Remaining Java processes: $remaining")
